reviews.comment:
Excelente atención. Me solucionaron un cambio de termostato del auto un sábado por la mañana y pude viajar el día siguiente como tenía previsto. Pude pagar con tarjeta de crédito y en cuotas.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. They fixed my car's thermostat on a Saturday morning, and I was able to travel the next day as planned. I was able to pay by credit card in installments.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURncXBpS3VRRRAB
